properties.remark: MICROBURST RESULTED IN DAMAGE TO NUMEROUS VINYL FENCES...SOME ROOF SHINGLES AND HOUSE SIDING ALONG EL RANCHO DRIVE IN BILLINGS HEIGHTS.
FENCE AND TREE DAMAGE REPORTED NEAR AIRPORT
PRIVATE BRIDGE WASHED OUT AND SHOP DAMAGED. WATER ROSE 6 TO 7 FEET IN MINUTES.

ALKALI CREEK FLOODED. SIGNIFICANT FLOODING REPORTED IN DOWNTOWN BILLINGS. THIS INCLUDED 4TH AVENUE...27TH STREET AND RIMROCK ROAD. MUD AND ROCKS WERE SWEPT FROM THE RIMS TOWARDS DOWNTOWN. BASEMENTS FLOODED AND FENCES WASHED OUT.

NUMEROUS REPORTS OF LARGE TREES AND BRANCHES DOWN ACROSS BILLINGS CAUSING POWER OUTAGES. DOWNED TREES AND BRANCHES HAVE ALSO FALLEN ON SEVERAL VEHICLES. ONE PARTICULAR DOWNED TREE BRANCH CAUSED A DOWNED POWER LINE THAT SPARKED A HOUSE FIRE.
TOPS OF TREES AND 8 INCH LIMBS BROKEN OFF
WINDS BLEW OVER SEVERAL FENCES IN TOWN AND BROKE TREE LIMBS. ROOF TO THE WESTERN MOTEL WAS BLOWN OFF IN ADDITION TO SEVERAL LARGE TREES BEING UPROOTED AND MANY POWER LINES DOWN.
